title: Delete Sequence command (Vision menu)
description:
The Delete Sequence command allows you to delete a vision sequence in the current project.

To delete a sequence

1. Select the sequence you want to delete from the list box.

2. Click Delete to delete the sequence.  A message will appear asking you to confirm the deletion.

Note:

If you accidentally delete a sequence, execute Restore from the File menu before executing Save project.
